lines.speaker: Sorceress
lines.text: Who are you and what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I go where I like and do what I like.

lines.speaker: Sorceress
lines.text: Not in my house. Be gone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have some sq'irks please?

lines.speaker: Sorceress
lines.text: What do you want them for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Someone asked me to bring them some.

lines.speaker: Sorceress
lines.text: In that case I'm sorry, but you can't. I have had a falling out with him recently and would rather not oblige him.

lines.speaker: Sorceress
lines.text: In that case I'm sorry, but you can't. I have had a falling out with his master recently and would rather not oblige him.
